Figure 4. Kaplan-Meier survival curves stratified by Random Survival Forest predicted risk scores. Training set (left) and test set (right) show probability of remaining MCI (not converting to AD) over time for three risk groups defined by risk score tertiles.

Figure 3. Cross-validation performance comparison across 8 model variants. Box plots show C-index distributions from 5-fold cross-validation for training (left), test (middle), and overfitting gap (right) sets.
